items.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
items.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

items.title: Travel app Hopper to pay $35M in FTC settlement over ‘unfairly’ charging hidden fees
items.summary: Hopper will pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that it used deceptive “dark patterns” to hide fees and mislead travelers about the costs and benefits of services.

items.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
items.summary: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

items.title: Can Cursor Remain a Platform for OpenAI and Anthropic’s Models Inside SpaceX?
items.summary: Cursor hopes to continue offering third-party AI models after it's acquired by SpaceX, testing the relationships between frontier AI labs.

items.title: Boeing-owned Wisk Aero accused of firing manager who raised safety concerns
items.summary: A former software manager claims Wisk rushed software testing ahead of a crucial 2025 flight test.

items.title: Google loses long-running appeal of record EU fine, will have to cough up $4.7 billion
items.summary: The EU went after Google for the practice of bundling its search engine and browser with Android.

items.title: Achieving operational excellence with AI
items.summary: Frameworks like Lean Six Sigma and business process management (BPM) first gained traction because they promised clarity in the chaos—a structured way to bring order to messy, sprawling operations. Lean Six Sigma emphasized statistical rigor and quality control; BPM created end-to-end maps of how work should flow across departments. Both offered a repeatable way to…

items.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

items.title: Popular TV-tracking app TV Time is shutting down as company focuses on AI
items.summary: TV Time, the popular TV-tracking app, is shutting down on July 15 as parent company Whip Media pivots toward enterprise AI products.
